zh.lifeSummary: 當Walter de Camville於大約1148年出生在英國英格蘭諾薩普頓史爾利爾布恩時，他的父親Richard Lilbourne Stanton De Camville34歲，母親Melisende de Rethel31歲。他於大約1123年與Mrs. Walter Camville在英國英格蘭諾薩普頓史爾諾薩普頓結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1176年之後。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Walter de Camville于大约1148年出生在英国英格兰諾薩普頓史爾利爾布恩时，他的父亲Richard Lilbourne Stanton De Camville34岁，母亲Melisende de Rethel31岁。他于大约1123年与Mrs. Walter Camville在英国英格兰諾薩普頓史爾諾薩普頓结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1176年之后。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Camville
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: French; English and Irish (of Norman origin): habitational name from any of the places in Calvados and Seine-Maritime named Carville, from the Scandinavian personal name Kári + Old French ville ‘settlement’.
Irish: shortened Anglicized form of Ó Cearbhaill or Mac Cearbhaill, see Carroll .

variants.name: Carroll
meanings: Irish: shortened Anglicized form of Ó Cearbhaill or Mac Cearbhaill ‘descendant (or son) of Cearbhall’, a personal name perhaps based on cearbh ‘hacking’ and hence originally a byname for a butcher or a fierce warrior.
English and Scottish: variant of   Carrell  .

variants.name: Garfield
meanings: English (Midlands): topographic name from Middle English gor(e), gar(e) ‘triangular piece’ + feld ‘open country, field’ (Old English gār + feld), for someone who lived by a triangular piece of land.
English: alternatively, sometimes perhaps a variant of Carville (a name of Norman origin), with excrescent final -d.
Americanized form of one or more similar (like-sounding) Jewish surnames.

nameMeanings.name: Walter
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French personal name of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from wald ‘rule’ + heri, hari ‘army’. This was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to England, superseding the native Old English form, Wealdhere. It was a very popular name in medieval England, normally pronounced ‘Water’.

variants.name: Walther
meanings: from wald ‘rule’ + heri ‘army’; name of the famous medieval minnesinger Walther von der Vogelweide ( c.1170– c.1230 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Walter de Camville was born about 1148, in Lilbourne, Northamptonshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Richard Lilbourne Stanton De Camville, was 34 and his mother, Melisende de Rethel, was 31. He married Mrs. Walter Camville about 1123, in Northampton, Northamptonshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 2 daughters. He died after 1176.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Walter de Camville est né environ 1148, à Lilbourne, Northamptonshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Richard Lilbourne Stanton De Camville, avait 34 ans et sa mère, Melisende de Rethel, avait 31 ans. Il a épousé Mrs. Walter Camville environ 1123, à Northampton, Northamptonshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé après 1176.

de.lifeSummary: Als Walter de Camville um 1148 in Lilbourne, Northamptonshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Richard Lilbourne Stanton De Camville 34 und seine Mutter Melisende de Rethel 31. Er hat um 1123 in Northampton, Northamptonshire, England, United Kingdom Mrs. Walter Camville geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 2 Töchter. Er starb nach 1176.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Walter de Camville è nato il circa 1148 nel Lilbourne, Northamptonshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Richard Lilbourne Stanton De Camville, aveva 34 anni e il suo madre, Melisende de Rethel, aveva 31 anni. Lui sposato Mrs. Walter Camville circa 1123, nel Northampton, Northamptonshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 2 figlie. Morì dopo il 1176.

ja.lifeSummary: Walter de Camvilleが約1148年にイギリスイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアリルボウルンで生まれた時，父Richard Lilbourne Stanton De Camvilleは34歳，母Melisende de Rethelは31歳であった。約1123年にイギリスイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアノーサンプトンでMrs. Walter Camvilleと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1176年以後に死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Walter de Camville(이)가 대략 1148년 영국 잉글랜드 노르섬프토실르 릴보우른에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Richard Lilbourne Stanton De Camville(은)는 34세였고, 그의 어머니 Melisende de Rethel(은)는 31세였다. 그는 대략 1123년 영국 잉글랜드 노르섬프토실르 노르섬프턴에서 Mrs. Walter Camville(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1176년 이후 사망했다.

Ele casou-se com Mrs. Walter Camville aproximadamente 1123, em Northampton, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu após 1176.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Walter de Camville родился около 1148 г. в местности лилбурн, нортамптоншир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Richard Lilbourne Stanton De Camville было 34 года, а матери, которую звали Melisende de Rethel, 31. Он женился на женщине по имени Mrs. Walter Camville около 1123 г. в местности нортамптон, нортамптоншир, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери. Он умер после 1176 г.

Se casó con Mrs. Walter Camville aproximadamente 1123, en Northampton, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 2 hijas. Murió después de 1176.
